data.name: PostgreSqlProjectQgisDescription
data.value:
🚀 Architecture & Optimization: Modeling of a spatial database (PostGIS) and indexing of complex geospatial queries.
⚙️ Automation & ETL: Writing stored functions for processing multi-format import/export geometries and scripts.
🔐 Security & Restitution: Fine-grained administration of access rights and integration of data flows into QGIS and dashboards.

data.name: PostgreSqlProjectSireoRCCDescription
data.value:
📐 Modeling: Design of a highly standardized and robust relational architecture.
🔌 .NET Core Pipeline: Development of a REST API to expose data to the internal web application.
📊 Reporting: Creation of optimized views for financial and operational reporting.

data.name: SqlServerProjectErpExploitationDescription
data.value:
🏎️ Performance & Concurrency: Indexing, tuning of heavy queries and management of multi-user transactions.
🧠 Business rules: Centralization of complex application logic via stored procedures (T-SQL).
🛡️ Ops & Data: Deployment of backup strategies (DRPs), high availability and feeding of BI streams in real time.

data.name: SqliteProjectMyExpenseDescription
data.value:
🚀 Scalable Architecture: Complete redesign of the MVVM application to migrate from a WPF interface to a cross-platform .NET MAUI / Blazor solution.
📊 Data & Reporting Engine: Local modeling under SQLite for transaction tracking, analytical management of flows (inputs/outputs) and recurrences (subscriptions, fixed costs).
🗺️ Geospatial & BI Module: Integration of a system to map expenses and generate advanced reports by brand, type of payment (card, transfer, check) and financial volume.

data.name: SqliteProjectControlOwfHeader
data.value: ⚡ Data Audit & Consistency Tools - Control OWF

data.name: SqliteProjectControlOwfDescription
data.value:
🎯 Centralization Pipeline (ETL): Massive extraction and consolidation of heterogeneous data (complex Excel files, telecom load calculations, GIS shapefiles) to a unified SQLite local database.
🧠 Rules & Validation Engine: Design of advanced relational queries and spatial controls to automatically point out inconsistencies (INSEE validations, absence of GPS coordinates, technical deviations).
📈 Business Impact: Automated generation of visual error reports for designers, dividing the processing time of final fiber connection files by a factor of 4 to 5 hours.

data.name: ProjectDialogHeaderContent
data.value: Here are the major projects where I designed and operated the database
